taskTemplate.name: HOI Review
taskTemplate.description: Review homeowners insurance policy for coverage adequacy and lender requirements

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Named Insured
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Named Insured – All owners, including Name of Trust are listed on policy. See title report

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Address
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Address – Address listed matches subject and includes unit number if applicable

subTaskTemplate.name: Unit Number
subTaskTemplate.description: Unit Number – Unit number included if applicable

subTaskTemplate.name: Dwelling Coverage
subTaskTemplate.description: Dwelling Coverage – Dwelling coverage should cover the minimum of the loan amount or the cost to rebuild new appraisal

subTaskTemplate.name: Builders Risk
subTaskTemplate.description: Builders Risk – If the file is a construction loan, does the binder state that it is a Builders Risk include and Under Construction Endorsement

subTaskTemplate.name: Replacement Cost Value
subTaskTemplate.description: Replacement Cost Value – Coverage should equal lesser of 100% replacement cost value or unpaid balance provided it is not less than 80% of RCV

subTaskTemplate.name: Effective Date
subTaskTemplate.description: Effective Date – Effective date is not after closing date

subTaskTemplate.name: Policy Term
subTaskTemplate.description: Policy Term – Policy term has not expired and is in effect on date of closing

subTaskTemplate.name: Annual Premium
subTaskTemplate.description: Annual Premium – Annual premium needs to be listed and state whether or not it has been paid

subTaskTemplate.name: Deductible Amount
subTaskTemplate.description: Deductible Amount – Deductible amount may not exceed 5% of insurance coverage amount

subTaskTemplate.name: Mortgagee Clause
subTaskTemplate.description: Mortgagee Clause – If sold, follow investor mortgagee clause requirements

subTaskTemplate.name: Binder Signature
subTaskTemplate.description: Binder Signature – Binder must be signed

subTaskTemplate.name: Name of Trust
subTaskTemplate.description: Name of Trust – Name of Trust added in addition to all borrower(s) and owner(s)
